name: claude-history
description: Queryable access to Claude Code session history — search messages, browse sessions, trace file operations, git operations, token usage, and run arbitrary SQL against the local session database.

db_path.title: Database Path
db_path.description: Path to the claude-history SQLite database

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Full-text search (FTS5) across all message content

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: Browse sessions filtered by project, date range

tools.name: query_messages
tools.description: Filter messages by session, type, model, tool, date

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: Files touched by Claude Code across sessions

tools.name: file_history
tools.description: Chronological operations on a specific file

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Git operations extracted from Bash tool calls

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Token usage, tool frequency, model breakdown

tools.name: run_query
tools.description: Execute named canned queries with parameter binding
